justification: The privacy policy explicitly states that Gemini collects and uses images shared with the app, including screenshots and browser content (L0013). It also permits using data to provide services, improve functionality, and train AI models (L0033, L0042). Since the uploaded photo contains no sensitive data (per user scenario), processing it for transcription and organization aligns with permitted uses.
